items: Confirm passport validity
Complete visa paperwork and required copies
Save flight and itinerary confirmations
Confirm travel insurance coverage
Store backup ID separately from passport
Call card issuer about international fees
Call phone provider about international usage
Install Alipay
Install WeChat
Set up DiDi or local transportation apps
Pack prescription medication in original containers
Prepare a small health kit
Save emergency contacts in phone and on paper
Plan for safe drinking water
Review program safety guidance
Set up VPN access if needed
Download an offline translation app
Pack chargers and a power adapter
Pack a power bank
Download course or travel files for offline access
Review itinerary by date and city
Share trip details with family
Confirm meeting time for departure day
Check weather and adjust clothing plans
Prepare one carry-on with essentials
Carry only essential valuables each day
Keep group contacts accessible
Stay aware of local transportation plan
Use cashless payment apps when possible
Keep reflection notes on visits and lectures
